title_en: Following The Line - Interview with CCDDBB (Claudio Dalla Bernardina)
description: In this interview episode of Waiting to Be Signed, artist CCDDBB (Claudio Dalla Bernardina) recounts growing up in a small village in Italy, learning BASIC on a VIC-20 and later HTML/JavaScript, studying fine arts/media design in Milan, doing 3D work and photography, producing documentaries, then moving to Thailand to manage a restaurant. He describes how COVID shutdowns and his long involvement with crypto led him to Tezos NFTs, early activity on Hic Et Nunc, and then fx(hash), where he learned generative techniques through community peers. He discusses his evolving approach using “profiles” for meaningful rarity and his ongoing “Potable Mess” series.      Follow Claudio on Twitter @CCDDBB    And on Instagram @CCDDBB.art   Check out his websites for more information about his work as well   ccddbb.vercel.app    https://www.claudiodallabernardina.com/      00:00 Welcome and Guest Intro  01:37 Early Computers and BASIC  04:11 Internet and First Web Work  06:00 Milan Fine Arts and 3D Studio  08:00 Photography and Reportage Lessons  09:47 Documentaries and Leaving Italy  12:13 Thailand Restaurant Reset  13:39 COVID and Crypto Comeback  16:40 Discovering NFTs and Hic Et Nunc  22:42 AI Side Projects and McFly Persona  26:34 fx(hash) Beginnings and First Drop  28:29 Generative Techniques and Community  30:40 Profiles, Rarity, and Project Craft  33:07 Breaking Power Ranges  35:07 One Line Obsession  36:44 Plotter Projects Stories  42:09 Why Not fx(hash)?  45:32 Plotting Process And Tools  47:34 Curated Release Plans  50:59 Bear Market Reflections  56:25 Blockchain Pros And Cons  01:02:10 Music And ' The Wallet '  01:08:41 Final Thanks And Goodbye     Thanks to Claudio for taking the time to come on the show!  Episode Art: one of many great Plottable Mess outputs by Claudio  Intro and Outro tracks by PixelWank
